CREATE TABLE test_table (numerators Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32), divisor Int32);
SELECT (SELECT tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber((1, 2, 3), 2) UNION ALL SELECT tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber((4, 5, 6), 0)) AS results;
WITH (SELECT tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber((25, 50, 75), 25)) AS quotients SELECT * FROM numbers(3) JOIN (SELECT tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber((100, 200, 300), 0)) AS zero_results ON numbers = 0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (num Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32), num2 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT A.num, tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber(A.num, B.num2) FROM another_table AS A JOIN test_table AS B ON A.num2 = B.divisor;
CREATE TABLE complex_case (id UInt32, tup Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32), div Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, tupleIntDivOrZeroByNumber(tup, div) FROM complex_case WHERE div IN (0, 1);
